name: Wonder Woman, Power Girl and Harley Quinn (Smitty34)
description:
“Do you Surrender?!”- Wonder Woman, “Face Facts you can’t win against us!”- Power Girl, “Haha! We gonna have lots of fun with you pudding~”- Harley Quinn

The truth or dare version with these three females… I hope it doesn’t be to bad
creator: Drizzz7615
